note: Complete SLA optimization data: corridor × destination × payout method × IN/OUT business hours.
business_hours_rule: UK: Mon-Fri before 14:00 GMT = IN (business), else OUT (after hours). Matches launchpad EmbeddedLeadTimeProvider.
sla_basis: Bank delivery: Leg 2 P80 only. Cash/Wallet: Leg 2 P80 (E2E needs Leg 1 added separately).
